summary: Webflow homepage hero redesign
description: Redesign homepage hero section with October 2026 banner photo. New tagline: Welcome Home to Shiloh. Gradient overlay opacity 0.6 per Pastor Wilkins review.

summary: Online giving Stripe integration
description: Stripe Payment Element on /give page. Three categories: Tithes & Offerings, Building Fund, Missions. Receipt confirmation email. 501(c)(3) verified.

summary: Sermon archive Webflow CMS migration
description: Migrate 47 WordPress sermon posts to Webflow CMS collection. Python CSV script via Webflow API. Map custom fields: date, pastor, scripture reference, audio URL.

summary: Prayer request form not delivering submissions
description: Prayer request form on /prayer not routing to pastor@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org. Webflow form notifications and SMTP under investigation. Possible domain blocklist issue.

summary: Google PageSpeed score below 70 on mobile
description: Homepage scores 58/100 on PageSpeed Insights mobile. Hero JPEG 2.1MB converted to WebP 380KB. Also need font-display:swap and deferred Lottie script.

summary: SSL certificate renewal for legacy subdomain
description: legacy.shilohbaptistbiloxi.org SSL expires 2027-01-14. Certbot cron fixed — Cloudflare API token now has Zone:DNS:Edit permission. Dry run confirmed.

summary: Accessibility audit - gallery image alt text
description: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. Added alt text field to Webflow Gallery CMS collection. Batch-updating ~45 images via Webflow API.

summary: Weekly bulletin PDF upload system
description: Webflow CMS Bulletins collection with date, title, PDF file fields. Gloria Tate has Editor access for weekly Friday uploads.

summary: VBS 2026 volunteer signup form
description: Webflow form at /vbs-volunteers. Fields include background check consent checkbox per Theresa Nguyen. Routes to vbs@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org.

summary: Social media feed embed on homepage
description: Custom Instagram oEmbed on homepage. Lighter than Smash Balloon plugin. Instagram Business account to be connected.

summary: Staff directory - add Rev. Darnell Hooks bio
description: Add Associate Pastor Rev. Darnell Hooks (joined March 2026) to /staff page with headshot and bio.

summary: Church history page 75th anniversary update
description: Pastor Wilkins provided revised /history page copy. 12 anniversary photos to be compressed and uploaded. Pending final photo processing.

summary: Events calendar update for 2026 schedule
description: Add 2026 events: VBS June 22-26, Picnic July 4, Back-to-School Prayer Aug 17, Fall Revival Sept 14-17, Homecoming Oct 11, Thanksgiving Nov 26, Christmas Cantata Dec 13.

summary: WordPress plugin updates November 2026
description: Applied: WP Mail SMTP 4.1.2, Yoast SEO 23.4, WP Super Cache 1.12.1, Wordfence 8.0.2, CF7 5.9.8. All staging tests passed.

summary: WordPress core update to 6.7
description: Applied WordPress 6.7 update. Tested on staging. Minor Gutenberg block alignment fix on Deacon Board page. Database backup completed before production deploy.

summary: Renew SSL certificate for shilohbaptistbiloxi.org
description: Let's Encrypt cert expires July 14 2026. Certbot cron fixed. Cloudflare API token permissions updated. Dry run confirmed successful.

summary: Set up Kubernetes cluster for church hosting
description: Provision 3-node K8s cluster (1 control-plane, 2 workers) on DigitalOcean. Deploy wordpress, nginx, mysql, redis, giving-portal workloads.

summary: Configure Datadog monitoring for church servers
description: Install Datadog agent on shiloh-web-01, shiloh-db-01, shiloh-media-01. Set up uptime, CPU, memory, disk monitors. Create Church Website Overview dashboard.

summary: Enable Cloudflare CDN caching for sermon MP3 files
description: Sermon audio files not cached by CDN. Configure Cloudflare cache rules for /wp-content/uploads/sermons/. Reduces monthly bandwidth costs.

summary: Building renovation project kickoff - committee formation
description: Formalize Building Committee membership. Members: Pastor Wilkins, Deacon Pittman, Gloria Tate, Lamar Boykin, Theresa Nguyen, Calvin Hargrove, John Baker. First meeting scheduled June 15 2026.

summary: Fellowship Hall renovation planning
description: Scope renovation of Fellowship Hall: new flooring, kitchen upgrades, HVAC replacement. Obtain 3 contractor bids. Lamar Boykin coordinating.

summary: Parking lot expansion - survey and permits
description: Get property survey for potential 20-space parking lot expansion on eastern lot. Research city of Biloxi permit requirements. John Baker volunteered to make contact with city offices.
